test-code.description: pass, ISO-8859-2, no constant for it
pass, String.getBytes(String) - ISO-8859-2, no constant for it
pass, new Scanner(Path, Charset) - UTF-8 from StandardCharsets
pass, new Scanner(Path, String) - ISO-8859-2, no constant for it
call inside the same class, alternative exists
ok, Charset.forName(String) - charset name is passed as variable
ok, random call to a method with an int parameter
ok, random call involving a variable
